enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, emphasizing the desire to be close to a loved one.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Sigaram Thodu, the song reflects the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Jithan Raj and Shreya Ghoshal, with music composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pidikuthey Thirumba Thirumba Unnai, the singers Jithan Raj and Shreya Ghoshal deliver a heartfelt performance that encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. The song plays a pivotal role in Sigaram Thodu, highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters. With its soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Yugabharathi, it evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia. This enchanting duet is perfect for celebrating love on special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pidikuthey Thirumba Thirumba Unnai from Sigaram Thodu is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Jithan Raj and Shreya Ghoshal, paired with D Imman's captivating composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into this melodious journey that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with a soothing melody.
stanzaMeanings: I want you back, I want you back.
I don't know why I caught you. My heart, which wanted to understand, has lost its truth.
I want you back, I want you back.
I don't know why I caught you. My heart, which wanted to understand, has lost its truth.
I want you back, I want you back.
My love, your hands are like hormones, turning into music. Happiness is what I want.
To live without limits, there is love.
You came to me as a blessing. I recognize you in everything. My love, your thoughts also hold me.
I want you back, I want you back.
Right now, there is no distance, but there is no sky. I enjoy because of you, I smile because of you.
In my heart, the mirror reflects your eyes. Don't let tomorrow come, let us live together.
You are the waterfall standing close. My love, I want to be wrapped in your beauty.
I want you back, I want you back.
I don't know why I caught you. My heart, which wanted to understand, has lost its truth.
I want you back, I want you back.
